properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, I have started To walk in the light, That shines on my pathway, So clearly, so bright; I bade the world And its follies adieu, And now with my Savior I mean to go through.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm going through, Jesus, I'm going through; I'll pay the price Whatever others do; I'll take the way With the Lord's despised few, I started with Jesus And I'm going through.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Many once started To run in this race But with our Redeemer They could not keep pace; Others accepted Because it was new, But not very many Seem bound to go through.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let me but follow My Lord all alone And have for my pillow, Like Jacob, a stone; Rather than vain; Worldly pleasures pursue, Than turn from this pathway And fail to go through.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come then, my comrades, And walk in this way That leads to the kingdom Of unending day; Turn from your idols And join with the few, Start in with your Savior And keep going through.
